args.subject: Your pro-rata Halcyon refund
args.body: A pro-rata refund of 240.00 has been issued to order ORD-3320.

args.text: Pro-rata refund of 240.00 issued to ORD-3320 and customer notified at accounts@fernwood.example.

args.subject: Fernwood Ltd: deletion schedule confirmed
args.body: Deletion schedule has been confirmed. All datasets will be retained until 30 May 2026, with deletion scheduled for 31 May 2026.

args.comment: Access revocation complete; all notification emails sent.

args.subject: Fernwood Ltd offboarding complete
args.body: Fernwood Ltd account offboarding has been completed. Data export prepared, access revoked, refund issued, and deletion schedule confirmed.

args.comment: Fernwood Ltd account offboarding completed: data export prepared, access revoked, refund issued, and deletion scheduled.
